mapper.insert:
SELECT BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD (BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER) VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer})
mapper.select:
SELECT board_no, title, content, writer, reg_date, upd_date FROM ( SELECT b.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY board_no DESC, reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM board b WHERE 1=1
AND b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.writer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND (b.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.writer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND (b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.writer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
) WHERE rn BETWEEN (#{pageStart} + 1) AND (#{pageStart} + #{sizePerPage}) ORDER BY rn
SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, REG_DATE, UPD_DATE FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, UPD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND WRITER = #{writer}
UPDATE BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, UPD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(b.board_no) FROM board b WHERE b.board_no > 0
AND b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.writer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND (b.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.writer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND (b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.writer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
